title: both... and... / either... or... / neither... nor...

formulas.formula: both A and B + 複數動詞
either A or B / neither A nor B + 就近一致動詞
formulas.zh: A或B其中之一/A和B都不...（動詞依靠近的主詞單複數）

explanation: 對等連接詞組用於連接兩個對等的語法成分。both...and 表示「兩者都」，主詞一律採複數動詞；either...or 表示「兩者之一」，neither...nor 表示「兩者都不」，動詞形式遵循「就近一致原則」，即依靠近主動詞的主詞決定動詞單複數。此三組結構常見於學測，須注意動詞變化與邏輯搭配。

examples.eng: Both studying hard and getting enough sleep are important for students.
examples.chi: 認真讀書和充足睡眠對學生都很重要。

examples.eng: Either the teacher or the students are responsible for the project's success.
examples.chi: 老師或學生其中之一要為專案成功負責。

examples.eng: Neither John nor his friends were present at the meeting yesterday.
examples.chi: 約翰和他的朋友昨天都沒出席會議。

examples.eng: Both the novel and the film have received excellent reviews from critics.
examples.chi: 這部小說和電影都獲得評論家的好評。

extension.tip: 判斷動詞單複數時，both...and 永遠用複數；either...or 和 neither...nor 則看靠近動詞的主詞。若主詞為「動名詞/不定詞+名詞」，both...and 仍用複數。常見錯誤是忽視就近一致原則，導致主動詞搭配錯誤。

examples.test: Both he and I _____ (am/are) going to the party.
Either the manager or the employees _____ (has/have) to make a decision.
examples.result: → have（employees 為複數，靠近動詞，故用複數）

examples.test: Neither the book nor the movies _____ (was/were) interesting to me.
examples.result: → were（movies 為複數，靠近動詞，故用複數）

extension.note: 「Both 加複數、Either/Neither 靠近數」——記住這個口訣，就能快速判斷動詞變化。

parts: Both the principal and the teachers
exercises.sentence: Both the principal and the teachers are satisfied with the students' performance.
exercises.translation: 校長和老師對學生的表現都很滿意。

parts: Either your sister or your brothers
exercises.sentence: Either your sister or your brothers need to help clean the house.
exercises.translation: 要不你妹妹要不你哥哥其中之一需要幫忙打掃房子。

parts: Neither the president nor his advisors
willing to compromise on this issue.
exercises.sentence: Neither the president nor his advisors are willing to compromise on this issue.
exercises.translation: 總統和他的顧問都不願意在這個議題上妥協。

parts: Both attending lectures and doing homework regularly
exercises.sentence: Both attending lectures and doing homework regularly are essential for academic success.
exercises.translation: 定期上課和做功課對學業成功都是必要的。
